# Scenario: issue 8 real-time-bars request-scoped API error, server_version=200.
# Raw evidence kept local:
# /tmp/ibkr-go-issue-8-captures/20260412T212310Z-realtime_bars_api_error
# events.jsonl sha256 prefix: fb799bbd0db35430
#
# Gateway accepted reqRealTimeBars for AAPL STK SMART/USD, then rejected the
# request asynchronously with a request-scoped APIError. The subscription must
# close with a non-retryable APIError rather than looking like a reconnect gap.
handshake {"server_version":200,"connection_time":"20260412 23:23:15 Central European Standard Time"}
server managed_accounts {"accounts":["DUP770846"]}
server next_valid_id {"order_id":1}
server api_error {"req_id":-1,"code":2104,"message":"Market data farm connection is OK:usfarm","advanced_order_reject_json":"","error_time_ms":"1776028995218"}
server api_error {"req_id":-1,"code":2107,"message":"HMDS data farm connection is inactive but should be available upon demand.ushmds","advanced_order_reject_json":"","error_time_ms":"1776028995218"}
server api_error {"req_id":-1,"code":2158,"message":"Sec-def data farm connection is OK:secdefnj","advanced_order_reject_json":"","error_time_ms":"1776028995218"}
client req_realtime_bars {"req_id":"$req1","contract":{"symbol":"AAPL","sec_type":"STK","exchange":"SMART","currency":"USD","primary_exchange":"","local_symbol":""},"what_to_show":"TRADES","use_rth":true}
server api_error {"req_id":"$req1","code":10089,"message":"Requested market data requires additional subscription for API. See link in 'Market Data Connections' dialog for more details.","advanced_order_reject_json":"","error_time_ms":"1776028995389"}
disconnect
